summary: Scanner Expansion Phase 1 testing complete. All 26 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with all new scanner setups integrated. New technical indicators (Bollinger Bands, Keltner Channels, Squeeze, Opening Range, Relative Strength vs SPY) are returned by /api/technicals/{symbol}. Scanner status shows 34 enabled setups including squeeze, mean_reversion, relative_strength, gap_fade, orb.

details.note: Scanner may show running=false outside market hours, which is expected behavior

details.test: Typed 'What is AAPL price?' and sent

critical_code_review_comments: New technical indicators correctly added to TechnicalSnapshot dataclass
_calculate_std helper method added for Bollinger Band calculation
_get_spy_change async method fetches and caches SPY daily % change for relative strength
Enhanced scanner properly includes all 4 new setup types in _enabled_setups

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components verified via Playwright

mocked_apis.note: Real Alpaca API data used for technical indicators

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scanner Expansion Phase 1 complete. New setups (squeeze, mean_reversion, relative_strength, gap_fade) integrated into enhanced_scanner.py and background_scanner.py. Technical snapshot API (/api/technicals/{symbol}) returns bollinger_bands, keltner_channels, squeeze, opening_range, relative_strength fields. Scanner status (/api/live-scanner/status) shows 34 enabled setups. Strategy Performance in frontend shows win rates for RUBBER BAND, SQUEEZE, BREAKOUT. Outside market hours, scanner shows 'Market closed' which is expected.
